creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

There is not enough information to requeue. You will need to provide us 
the stack trace if hald crashes. Without any details, only I can say is 
to restart your hald as of a workaround. 

If you are able to figure out or/and collect the details. Feel free to 
open a new PR. Be sure to complete follow both links: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html 
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/halfaq.html#q4
